# Tangle â€” Copilot Coding Agent Instructions

## Project Overview
Tangle is an Excel reference visualization tool that parses `.xlsx`/`.xlsm` workbooks client-side and renders their inter-sheet/inter-file dependencies as interactive node graphs. Everything runs in the browser â€” no server. It also ships as a Tauri v2 desktop app.

## Tech Stack
- **UI:** React 19, TypeScript ~5.9, Tailwind CSS 4, React Flow (`@xyflow/react` 12)
- **Layout:** `@dagrejs/dagre` 2
- **Parsing:** SheetJS (`xlsx` 0.18)
- **Desktop:** Tauri v2
- **Build:** Vite 7
- **Unit tests:** Vitest 4 (jsdom for DOM, node for lib)
- **E2E tests:** Playwright 1.58 (Chromium)
- **Linting:** ESLint 9 + typescript-eslint
- **Git hooks:** Husky + lint-staged (runs ESLint on staged `.ts`/`.tsx`)

## Repository Structure
```
src/
  App.tsx                         # Root app component
  main.tsx                        # Entry point
  index.css                       # Global styles (Tailwind)
  types.ts                        # Shared TypeScript types
  lib/
    parser.ts                     # Excel parsing (SheetJS) â€” extracts sheets, tables, references, formulas
    graph.ts                      # Graph construction (Dagre layout, buildGraph, buildOverviewGraph, grouping modes)
    resolver.ts                   # Formula reference resolver, cycle detection, topoSort, rename propagation
    filenameSanitizer.ts          # Filename sanitization, NFC normalization, collision handling
  components/
    FilePanel/                    # Sidebar: file upload, file list, visibility toggles
    Graph/                        # GraphView, Toolbar, custom nodes/edges, React Flow wrapper
    ui/                           # Shared UI primitives
tests/
  unit/                           # Vitest unit tests (tests/unit/**/*.test.ts)
  e2e/                            # Playwright E2E tests (tests/e2e/)
  fixtures/                       # Test fixture .xlsx files and generator
  helpers/                        # Shared test utilities
.github/
  workflows/
    ci.yml                        # Build + test + lint (PRs and pushes)
    deploy.yml                    # GitHub Pages + Tauri build (main only, gated on CI)
```

## Key Conventions

### Code Style
- Use TypeScript strict mode. No `any` unless absolutely unavoidable (and comment why).
- Use named exports, not default exports.
- React components: functional components only, no class components.
- Prefer `const` over `let`. Never use `var`.
- Use Tailwind CSS utility classes for styling â€” no CSS modules or styled-components.

### Git & Branching
- Branch prefixes: `feature/`, `fix/`, `chore/`, `docs/`, `test/`
- Commit messages: Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, `test:`)
- One logical change per commit. Keep PRs focused and atomic.

### Testing
- **Unit tests** go in `tests/unit/` and must end in `.test.ts`.
- **E2E tests** go in `tests/e2e/` and must end in `.spec.ts`.
- Test fixtures (`.xlsx` files) go in `tests/fixtures/`.
- Run unit tests: `npm test` (Vitest)
- Run E2E tests: `npm run test:e2e` (Playwright)
- Run lint: `npm run lint`
- Run build: `npm run build` (`tsc -b && vite build`)
- **All tests must pass and lint must be clean before marking a PR ready.**

### Architecture Rules
- **No server-side code.** All parsing and rendering is client-side.
- `src/lib/` contains pure logic modules â€” no React imports, no DOM access.
- `src/components/` contains React components â€” they may import from `src/lib/`.
- `src/types.ts` is the single source of truth for shared interfaces (`WorkbookFile`, `ExcelSheet`, `ExcelTable`, `SheetReference`, etc.).
- Graph layout must be **deterministic** â€” same input must produce the same layout. Sort nodes/edges lexicographically before passing to Dagre.
- Formula reference resolution uses **case-insensitive matching**.

### Performance & Quality
- Layout operations must complete in â‰¤ 400 ms for medium-sized graphs.
- Formula parsing: support `TableName[Column]`, `QueryName.Result[Column]`, and `[@Column]` structured references.
- Filename sanitization: NFC normalization, illegal char stripping, path traversal prevention, reserved name protection, collision resolution with `_<hash6>` suffix.

### Accessibility
- All interactive controls must have ARIA labels.
- Support keyboard navigation and shortcuts where applicable.
- Target WCAG 2.2 AA compliance for UI components.

## CI/CD
- `ci.yml` runs on all PRs and pushes: installs deps, builds, lints, runs unit tests.
- `deploy.yml` runs only on `main` after CI passes: deploys to GitHub Pages and builds Tauri desktop app.
- **Do not add environment references (like `github-pages`) to `ci.yml`** â€” this causes `action_required` status on PR checks.

## Common Pitfalls
- SheetJS (`xlsx`) must be inlined in Vitest config (`server.deps.inline: ['xlsx']`) or tests will fail.
- React Flow nodes/edges are immutable â€” always create new arrays, never mutate in place.
- When modifying `graph.ts`, ensure backward compatibility with existing `buildGraph` call signatures.
- E2E tests rely on `data-testid` attributes â€” don't remove them from components without updating tests.
- The `name` field on `WorkbookFile` is the **internal canonical identifier** (sanitized + collision-resolved). Use `originalName` for UI display.

## Active Sprint Context
The current sprint is tracked in issue #11 (Tangle System Cleanup & Reliability Sprint). Child issues cover graph controls, formula references, file naming, layout reflow, code quality, E2E testing, and performance budgets. When working on a child issue, implement **only** what that issue describes â€” do not make unrelated changes.
